top_signals.title: Why oil investors fear the next toll fight could be the Strait of Malacca
top_signals.summary: The prospect of fees to transit the Strait of Hormuz has sparked alarm, not least by investors who fear it could be replicated in other maritime corridors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: CNBC Daily Open: Belgium's sweet victory, Ukraine's air battle and Le Pen's judgement day
top_signals.summary: A decisive victory for Belgium over the U.S. on the football pitch sends them to the quarter-finals amid a contentious chapter for FIFA.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Suntory sees opportunity in the OTC medicine business
top_signals.summary: The drinks maker is acquiring Daiichi Sankyo Healthcare and already has a health foods subsidiary.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan to launch council to overhaul legal frameworks governing AI use
top_signals.summary: The government is seeking to advance what is described as AI transformation, or a fundamental review of work using AI, to cope with population decline.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
